info.title: LZA Terraform Generator
info.description: Generates compliant Terraform configurations for AWS Landing Zone account customizations

post.summary: Generate Terraform IaC for a new AWS account
post.description: Generates a main.tf and README.md for the specified AWS services, following organization best practices, and commits them to the AFT account customizations repository.

AccountEmail.description: Email address for the AWS account

AccountName.description: Name identifier for the account (used in file paths)

CustomizationName.description: Template name for the customization (e.g., web-app, data-lake)

AwsServices.description: Comma-separated list of AWS services to configure (e.g., 'ec2, s3, rds, lambda')

200.description: Terraform configuration generated and committed successfully

main_tf_url.description: GitHub URL to the generated main.tf

readme_url.description: GitHub URL to the generated README.md
